description: A hard, brittle substance, typically transparent or translucent, made by fusing sand with soda and lime.
commonMistakes: Recycling broken glass (can be dangerous and contaminate batches)
Including Pyrex, window glass, or mirrors
Leaving thick food residue like peanut butter
facts: Glass is 100% recyclable and can be recycled endlessly without loss in quality.
Recycled glass is substituted for raw materials, reducing emissions and raw material consumption.
A glass bottle can take over 1 million years to break down in a landfill.
